known_gaps: The remaining contract-closing Lean obligation is still the W1270 one-input W987 branch-specific full-data provider surface.
W1301 shows W983 endpoint-localized-unit unpacking and the W949 primitive route do not close the provider obligation.
No product_success terminal witness or review packet has been produced.
remaining_work: Construct or eliminate the remaining W1270 one-input W987 branch-specific full-data provider obligation.
Replace the nonterminal product_success=false outcome with a product_success outcome only after the immutable original four-task contract has Lean evidence, audit evidence, and a review packet.
Run the required contract and external audits again after any claimed terminal witness.
summary: W1301 proves W983 endpoint-localized-unit unpacking does not close the original four-task contract: W983 expands to a five-input full-data surface and W949 expands to a four-input primitive route, both larger than the remaining W1270 one-input W987 surface.
